channel.title: PennyWise Beginner
channel.description: Personal finance, made simple — for total beginners.

item.title: Understanding Compound Interest: Why It Matters for You
item.description: Learn what compound interest is and how it helps your money grow over time. Discover why starting early is the most powerful tool in your financial toolkit.

item.title: How to Use the 50/30/20 Rule to Start Budgeting
item.description: Learn how to simplify your finances using the 50/30/20 rule. This beginner-friendly guide explains how to divide your income into needs, wants, and savings.

item.title: Best Beginner Savings Accounts Explained
item.description: Learn how to choose the best savings account for your goals. We explain High-Yield Savings Accounts, traditional banks, and how to start saving today.
